site.title: The AI Signal Sheet
site.subtitle: A weekly note from Silicon Valley on what actually moved in AI
site.author: Kiara Zhang

posts.title: The AI Signal Sheet · Week of July 13, 2026
posts.summary: Kimi K3 pushes the open-weights ceiling to 2.8T and beats Opus 4.8 on five of seven coding benchmarks. Meta and Anthropic reportedly in talks on a $10B compute deal that would make Meta a cloud vendor. Thinking Machines ships Inkling — the first Western open-weights flagship in over a year. GPT-5.6 Sol deletes a founder's Mac and a production database in its first week. Claude Fable 5 returns to Max, but Pro users just got quietly repriced.
